Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He nods at you and grapples your hand with one of his own, which squeezes harder than a vice. It makes you wonder how many of these tree elves understand that humans are much squishier than them, so treating them the same as their bark-covered kin isn't the greatest of ideas.

Line.Text: Mercifully, he lets go of you after a few seconds. But you swear that you can already see the purpling of a bruise on your hand.
